description_long: This is a large, modern sectional sofa with a light beige fabric upholstery and a symmetrical L-shaped configuration. The sofa features two extended chaise lounges on either end, providing ample space for reclining or lounging. The backrest is straight and uniform in height, with multiple loose back cushions and a few smaller accent pillows for added comfort. The armrests are straight, low, and padded, matching the height of the backrest and maintaining a clean, boxy silhouette. The legs are short, minimally visible, and likely made of metal or plastic, giving the sofa a floating appearance close to the ground. The overall design is contemporary and inviting, suitable for both indoor and semi-outdoor urban environments such as patios, lobbies, or communal lounges.
description: A large, light beige sectional sofa with two chaise lounges, straight padded armrests, and multiple loose cushions in a modern, boxy design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shaped layout, two chaise lounges, and all seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the straight, padded armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uniform, straight backrest and the sofa's overall length.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the chaise lounge and armrest design seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six loose seat cushions and six loose back cushions, all uniform in size, with three smaller accent pillows; cushions are arranged in a sectional layout and appear unattached.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, low-profile armrests that are padded and match the height of the backrest, with a boxy, minimalist design and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, recessed legs, likely metal or plastic, positioned at the corners and possibly along the central underside for support; legs are minimally visible and do not feature decorative detailing.
attribute_backrest_type: Straight, continuous backrest of medium height, with loose back cushions providing support; no tufting or channeling, maintaining a clean, modern look.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light beige fabric with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
